title: NEC cape
description: Rename the leggings to "cape" to become the most fashionable
body:
# **This resource pack requires EMF and CIT to work.**

**Renaming any leggings except leather ones will turn them into a cape.**
![back view](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/969a261ac553beaf1c7ec161bf88923fdb21abc7_0.webp)
**The cape is made for leggings so that it can be combined with a chestplate.**
![front view with chestplate](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5c20a2bb2c55153e5c14ce1e31959955ed798810_0.webp)
